prompt_text:
### Demographics: 74-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 15 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Orthopedic fracture (healed)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF (No); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 67.3 kg; Height 180.3 cm; BMI 20.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 131/89 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.5%; 9 months ago 8.1%; 6 months ago 7.6%; 3 months ago 7.1%; current 6.1%), FPG (12 months ago 199mg/dL; 9 months ago 184mg/dL; 6 months ago 204mg/dL; 3 months ago 178mg/dL; current 140mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 68.9kg; 9 months ago 69.3kg; 6 months ago 63.6kg; 3 months ago 61.2kg; current 67.3kg), Height (12 months ago 180.3cm; 9 months ago 180.3cm; 6 months ago 180.3cm; 3 months ago 180.3cm; current 180.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 19.0kg/m²; current 20.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 128mmHg; 9 months ago 127mmHg; 6 months ago 131mmHg; 3 months ago 126mmHg; current 131mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 89mmHg; 9 months ago 86mmHg; 6 months ago 89mmHg; 3 months ago 88mmHg; current 89mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 22U/L; 9 months ago 27U/L; 6 months ago 22U/L; 3 months ago 27U/L; current 25U/L), AST (12 months ago 25U/L; 9 months ago 27U/L; 6 months ago 27U/L; 3 months ago 24U/L; current 23U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.0mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 100mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 99mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 103mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 102mL/min/1.73m²; current 100mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 46mg/g; 9 months ago 58mg/g; 6 months ago 58mg/g; 3 months ago 46mg/g; current 54mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 89mg/dL; 9 months ago 90mg/dL; 6 months ago 94mg/dL; 3 months ago 88mg/dL; current 91mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 57mg/dL; 9 months ago 59mg/dL; 6 months ago 57mg/dL; 3 months ago 60mg/dL; current 58mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 114mg/dL; 9 months ago 111mg/dL; 6 months ago 128mg/dL; 3 months ago 111mg/dL; current 120mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.8g/dL; 6 months ago 13.1g/dL; 3 months ago 13.0g/dL; current 13.4g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.50 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
